The 74HCXX (where the HC stands for high-speed CMOS) familyMOS devices. The 74CXX design will require considerably less operating power but will be restricted toinverters. For instance, a 7404 is an IC that contains six inverters, and the 74C04 also contains sixmanufactured using MOS technology. When the design is finalized, the data can be burned into PROMs (smallHere are some commercially available EPROMs:electrically reprogrammable.The effect is to wipe out the stored contents. In other words, the EPROM is ultraviolet-light-erasable anda quartz window in the IC package. When it strikes the chip, the ultraviolet light releases all stored charges.stored with an EPROM programmer. Later, data can be erased with ultraviolet light. register. A shift register can also be connected to form a numberoperationsdata in a microprocessor system. The UART is constructed using registers and some control logic.the input-output channels. A universal asynchronous receiver transmitter (UART) is a chip used to exchangethe display on a CRT screen. Thus registers form a very important link between the main digital system andused to accept output data from a microprocessor chip and then present this data to the circuitry used to driveare often used to momentarily store binary data at the outputan alphanumeric keyboard and then present this data at the inputinformation appearing at the outputA register is a very important digital building block. A data register is often used to momentarily store binary
A binary register also forms the basis for some very important arithmetic operations.

are commercially available as TTL MSI/LSI circuits. For instance:serial out, serial in-parallel out, parallel in-serial out, and parallel in-parallel out. Allout shifting.shifting.either the most significant bit (MSB) or the least significant bit (LSB). This technique is referred to asof these functions is called a(shifted) into the register and possibly shifted out. A grouphave eight flip-flops. Naturally the flip-flops must be connected such that the binary number can be enteredflop for each bit in the binary number. For instance, a register used to store an 8-bit binary number mustA register is simply a groupregister is used in any specific application encountered.of simply too numerous to be discussed here. Our intent is to study the detailed operationadvantages.as sequence generator and sequence detector and also as parallel to serial converters offers very distinct
Serial in-serial  There are two ways to shift data into a register (serial or parallel) and similarly two ways to shift the data two ways. The first method involves shifting the data 1 bit at a time in a serial fashion, beginning withThe bits in a binary number (let's call them the data) can be moved from one place to another in either shift registers. design and implementation advantages.to generate circuit output. Both the methods are discussed in detail in this chapter.memory values. In Mealy model circuit inputs, also known as primary inputs combine with memory elementsMoore model circuit outputs, also called primary outputs are generated solely from secondary outputs ordelay elements. In this chapter, we show how these techniques can be used in sequential circuit design.Memory (ROM) based implementation, excitation tables are not required however; flip-flops are used asthrough Karnaugh Map. The finalsynthesis table. For flip-flop based implementation, excitation tables are used to generate design equationsa state transition diagram or Algorithmic State Machine (ASM) chart followed by preparationdiagram having sequential and combinatorial logic elements. The word description is first converted toDesign problem normally starts with a word description
In general, sequential logic circuit design refers toThere are two different approaches

Then you use the current tracer to locate the exact position along a trace where the short is.the trouble (a solder bridge, in this discussion).over the trouble. During troubleshooting, a visual check at this critical location usually reveals the naturecurrent tracer goes out. Move right, and it turns on. When this happens, you know the current tracer is directlytracer will light up. The critical position for the current tracer is directly over the short. Move left, and thewire.along the path shown. The current tracer will not detect this current because it is touching another partTherefore,blunt insulated tip is a small pick-up coil than can detect the magnetic field around a wire carrying current.
That's the basic idea behind a current tracer. You use theIf In Fig. 14.46b, each time you trigger the logic pulser, a conventional current flows through its tip to ground
 you move the current tracer between the ground and the logic pulser as shown in Fig. 14.46c, the current
